message:
fix: add exponential backoff and max-restart cap to Dolt server restarts (gt-s2rdt7)

EnsureRunning() previously used a flat 5s restart delay with no limit,
masking systemic issues when the Dolt server crash-loops. Now uses
exponential backoff (5s, 10s, 20s... capped at 5min) and a max-restart
cap (5 restarts in 10min). Exceeding the cap sends an ESCALATION mail
to the mayor instead of retrying. Backoff resets after the server stays
healthy for 5 minutes. All values are configurable via DoltServerConfig.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
